description: Backfill phase log entries for Phases 18-40, run all 6 gates, paste gate outputs, commit with tags phase-40-complete and phase-41-baseline
steps: Read the existing phase log at .agents/state/quant-phase-log.md (currently documents Phases 0-17 in detail).

Add entries for Phases 18-40 based on what exists in the codebase. Use the task directories in .agents/tasks/ as evidence (task-phase-18-truth-reset, task-phase-19-creator-economy, task-phase-20-trust-safety, etc.). For each phase, document: what shipped (based on packages/services that exist), a note that gate evidence was from the original autonomous run. Key phases to document based on codebase evidence: Phase 18 (truth reset/agent swarm - monolith-per-app consolidation), Phase 19 (creator economy/realtime media), Phase 20 (federation/trust-safety), Phase 21 (agentic intelligence/sync engine), Phase 22 (ML serving/quantmeet), Phase 23 (frontend wireup/quantdocs), Phase 24 (identity-session-wallet-permissions/quantdrive), Phase 25 (quantcalendar), Phase 26-40 (remaining features visible in packages). Include note: 'Gate evidence from original autonomous run; re-validated in phase-41 baseline cleanup PR.'
Run all 6 gates and capture output: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm build, pnpm lint, pnpm audit --audit-level=high
Add a 'Phase 41 Baseline Cleanup' section to the phase log with real gate output evidence from the run.
Stage all changes (deleted services, updated workflows/helm, upgraded payments, phase log).
Commit with message: 'chore: phase 41 baseline cleanup - stub deletion, phase log, payment SDKs'
acceptance_criteria: Phase log has entries for Phases 18-40
Phase log has Phase 41 entry with real gate output from this run
All 6 gates pass: install, typecheck, test, build, lint, audit-high
Git commit exists with correct message
Git tags phase-40-complete and phase-41-baseline are created
verification: Run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm audit --audit-level=high
Run: git log --oneline -1 to confirm commit message
Run: git tag -l 'phase-*' to confirm tags exist
findings: All 6 gates pass: install (1.6s), typecheck (88/88), test (91/91), build (63/63), lint (73/73), audit (0 high/critical). Squashed FEAT-001 and FEAT-002 commits into single commit. Tags phase-40-complete and phase-41-baseline created.
